name: Love in a Leash
description:
“There's blood in my eyes. See it as life.”

[Stockholm Syndrome Denial]

.

A twisted obsession condensed into love, is what Gunsther has for a captor. It was never intentional, but it happened anyway. That's a beautiful horror of attachment, it lingers onto the wrong people sometimes. Sorry that the wrong person in this scenario has to be you, he has to grow attached to someone somehow.

Warning, sensitive topics such as implied torture, blood, abduction, and abuse.
[Avatar Source: @kimdog]
creator: shokokokok
